meanings.definition: act of transferring property title from one person to another
make known; pass on, of information
examples: She conveyed the message to me

meanings.definition: serve as a means for expressing something
examples: The painting of Mary carries motherly love
His voice carried a lot of anger

meanings.definition: transmit or serve as the medium for transmission
take something or somebody with oneself somewhere
examples: Bring me the box from the other room
Take these letters to the boss
This brings me to the main point

meanings.definition: go or come after and bring or take back
examples: Get me those books over there, please
